description_long: This is a large, tracked military combat vehicle with a low, angular profile and a robust, armored exterior. The vehicle features a prominent main cannon mounted centrally on the hull, with additional equipment such as antennas, storage packs, and a machine gun visible on the roof. The sides are equipped with heavy-duty tracks and armored skirts, providing protection and mobility over rough terrain. The rear of the vehicle displays storage compartments and external gear, while the front is reinforced with sloped armor and grilles for engine ventilation. The surface is painted in a dark, matte green with subtle weathering and wear, suggesting extensive use. The vehicle is designed for tactical operations, offering both offensive and defensive capabilities in urban environments.
description: A heavily armored, tracked military combat vehicle with a central cannon, roof-mounted machine gun, and dark green matte finish. It features robust side skirts, storage gear, and visible antennas.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armor, central cannon, and engine grilles, with antennas and roof details visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the tracks, side armor skirts, and the rear storage area.
description_view_2: Rear view displays external storage packs, rear armor, and the back end of the tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the machine gun mount on the roof, side armor, and additional equipment.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted centrally on the hull and one machine gun mount on the roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with sloped and reinforced panels on the front, sides, and rear; appears thick and robust.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green matte paint with weathering and minor wear.
